data.content: Implemented loom update for installed release binaries using GitHub redirect-based latest asset resolution, checksum verification, archive extraction, and atomic self-replacement. Tightened install.sh target detection to the published release matrix, documented the new update flow, and added unit plus integration coverage for target mapping, redirected-version parsing, --check, no-op, --force, and unsupported targets. Validation completed with cargo fmt --all --check, cargo test, and cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings. Branch: loom-5a3c-update, commit: 3cbe24d66c40.
